## ❓ Question
Please ask your question about Kair0s here.

## 🔍 Context
Provide context for your question:

- What are you trying to accomplish?
- What have you tried so far?
- What documentation have you read?

## 📚 Documentation Check
- [ ] I have read the README.md
- [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I have searched the documentation
- [ ] I have searched existing issues

## 🖥️ Environment
Please provide your environment information:

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14.0]
- Node.js Version: [e.g. 22.12.0]
- Kair0s Version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- Browser: [if applicable]

## 📋 Additional Details
Add any other details that might help answer your question.

## 🎯 Expected Answer
What kind of answer would help you most?

- [ ] Code example
- [ ] Explanation of concept
- [ ] Link to documentation
- [ ] Step-by-step guide
- [ ] Configuration help
